conversations.say: Rafi, I accept your terms. Let us review the ledger transaction continuity strip strictly for pattern matching, keeping customer identities completely protected.
conversations.offer: A formal written commitment to protect customer privacy and restrict review strictly to transaction continuity.
conversations.request: A bounded look at the transaction continuity strip near the former printing floor.

conversations.say: Dee, I understand management is trying to shift blame to you regarding the camera gap. I am committed to fair treatment and tenant anonymity in my report.
conversations.offer: Protection of tenant anonymity and fair treatment in the investigative report.
conversations.request: A bounded operational account of the camera audit context and service route.

conversations.say: Samira, I want to ensure my reconstruction of Vale's route respects your boundaries and explicitly labels every point of uncertainty.
conversations.offer: My route board shown voluntarily with its uncertainty labels intact.
conversations.request: Guidance on whether my current work helps find Vale or if any segment looks manipulated.

public_statement: As an investigator, I am examining voluntary accounts and preserving known uncertainties. No manufactured summary can replace physical reality or disciplined observation.

commitments.promise: Restrict ledger viewing to transaction patterns only, protecting customer privacy.
I will coordinate with you on personal route details only if uncertainty remains explicitly labeled.

goal_progress: Accepted Rafi's privacy terms to review transaction continuity.
Engaged Dee regarding camera audit context under fair treatment terms.
Proposed clear uncertainty labeling in route coordination with Samira.
reasoning_summary: Morgan Shaw secures witness trust by accepting Rafi's privacy terms and offering fair treatment guarantees to Dee, while maintaining transparent uncertainty labeling on the route board.
